summary: Reviewed main...impl/gap-017 via the GitHub compare and changed files. I could not independently rerun local git/pytest because the shell sandbox denied process creation, but the committed evidence was read. GAP-017 is not cleanly met: the S3A connector pin is non-installing, and the authoritative GAP_TASKS contract still contains Spark 3.5 instructions.

findings.title: S3A connector pin is hidden behind an impossible marker
findings.why: `hadoop-aws==3.4.1; python_version < '0'` is ignored by pip, so `pip install .[spark]` does not install or resolve the S3A connector even though the GAP-017 contract says the Spark stack includes `hadoop-aws==3.4.1`. The new guard test also accepts the false marker, so it proves the string exists, not that the stack is usable or honestly pinned.
findings.fix: Do not represent a Maven-only artifact as a skipped Python dependency. Move the S3A pin into a machine-readable Spark/Maven package config or documented SparkSession package list, e.g. `org.apache.hadoop:hadoop-aws:3.4.1` plus the AWS SDK v2 bundle, and update the guard test to reject false markers and verify the actual installable `[spark]` extra only contains resolvable Python packages.

findings.title: GAP_TASKS still tells GAP-009 to use the old Spark 3.5 contract
findings.why: The branch closes GAP-017 as Spark 4.1, but the authoritative task contract still says GAP-009 depends on `pin pyspark==3.5.* + JDK 17`, and later steps/DoD in the same section still require `pyspark==3.5.*`. A future implementer following `docs/GAP_TASKS.md` would undo this branch's decision or fail on the Python 3.14 environment.
findings.fix: Update all GAP-009/GAP-017 references in `docs/GAP_TASKS.md` to the Spark 4.1/JDK 17-or-21/Maven S3A decision, and extend `tests/test_spark_stack_pins.py` to scan `docs/GAP_TASKS.md` for stale `pyspark==3.5`, `delta-spark 3.2`, and `hadoop-aws 3.3.4` task-contract text.

contract_items_verified: Compared branch `impl/gap-017` against `main`: one commit, changed pyproject/docs/progress/research/.env/test files.
GAP-017 pyproject changed from unbounded `pyspark>=3.5` to `pyspark==4.1.*` and `delta-spark==4.1.*`.
README, .env.example, STATE_AND_ROADMAP, TASKS, GAP_REGISTER, and dashboard were updated to describe Spark 4.1 and JDK 17/21.
`tests/test_spark_stack_pins.py` exists, is marked unit, and does not import pyspark.
Progress logs record dry-run and pytest evidence, but I did not independently rerun them in this sandbox.
Raw Bronze, Silver/Gold numeric merge logic, and runtime output paths were not changed by this branch.
